name: github
description: Read and manage GitHub repositories, issues, pull requests, and code from TulipFarm agents.

required_env.name: GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN
required_env.label: Personal Access Token
required_env.description: GitHub PAT with repo and other scopes. Fill this to connect directly, or use OAuth below.
steps: Go to GitHub Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens → Tokens (classic)
Click Generate token and copy the value

required_env.name: GITHUB_CLIENT_ID
required_env.label: OAuth Client ID
required_env.description: GitHub OAuth App Client ID. Required only for OAuth flow.
steps: Go to GitHub Settings → Developer settings → OAuth Apps
Set Authorization callback URL to your TulipFarm callback (see SETUP.md)
Click Register application, then copy the Client ID

required_env.name: GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET
required_env.label: OAuth Client Secret
required_env.description: GitHub OAuth App Client Secret. Required only for OAuth flow.
steps: Open your OAuth App in GitHub Settings → Developer settings → OAuth Apps
Click Generate a new client secret and copy it
